task: place the milk dairy in the white plate
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container with a green lid is on the right. A white plate is in the center. A red apple is on the white plate. A brown object is on the table to the right of the plate. A small blue object is on the table to the left of the plate. The robot arm is positioned over the white plate. STRATEGY - First, grasp the red apple from the white plate. Then, transport it to the blue container. Finally, place it inside the container. Failure modes include dropping the apple during transport or misaligning it with the container's opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the red apple on the white plate. Step 2: Grasp the red apple. Step 3: Transport the apple to the blue container. Step 4: Place the apple inside the blue container.
Goal: inside(red_apple, blue_container)
Scene: red_apple, white_plate, blue_container, table
Step 1: reach(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_apple, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_apple) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: holding(red_apple) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_apple)
Step 3: transport(red_apple -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the blue container
  spatial: above(red_apple, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_apple)
  done_when: above(red_apple, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_apple -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(red_apple, blue_container) [completion]; released(red_apple) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_apple) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_apple, blue_container) AND released(red_apple)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red apple
the body of the red apple
the top opening of the blue container
the top opening of the blue container
